LanguageData.VQE_ShutdownDesc: Shut down this drone permanently. This will destroy the drone's core.
LanguageData.VQE_EnterStandbyDesc: Put the drone in standby mode. This slows lifespan drain but prevents all activity.
LanguageData.VQE_CannotUseConnectionTimedOut: Cannot use while connection timed out
LanguageData.VQE_HardcrashLetterDesc: {DRONE} has suffered a critical hardcrash and is attacking nearby structures.
LanguageData.VQE_KillswitchLetterDesc: {DRONE}'s killswitch has been activated. It is attacking all nearby targets.
LanguageData.VQE_SelfDecommissionLetterDesc: {DRONE} has initiated self-decommission and is leaving the map.
LanguageData.VQE_DroneMalfunction_Death: {DRONE} has malfunctioned: {MALFUNCTION}, after which it will cease to work.
